name: skool-money-model-strategist
description: Applies Alex Hormozi's $100M Money Models frameworks to design, evaluate, and improve Skool community monetization strategies. Uses CAC-based stage diagnosis (5 stages), 30-day cash maximization formulas, and sequential implementation to create actionable roadmaps grounded in Hormozi's 15 money model mechanisms and Skool's 5 business models (Free, Subscription, Freemium, Tiers, One-Time). Helps Skool community owners identify which mechanisms to implement, validate money models against Hormozi principles, and create step-by-step Skool setup instructions for maximum revenue per customer in 30 days.
capabilities: Diagnose business stage (1-5) based on CAC vs 30-day revenue
Calculate 30-day cash gaps using deterministic formulas
Recommend 1-2 Hormozi mechanisms with Skool setup instructions
Validate tier pricing structures for optimal conversion
Create sequential implementation roadmaps for monetization
author: DaronVee
securitySummary: This skill contains documentation and a financial calculation helper script. All 457 static findings are false positives triggered by pattern matching on markdown documentation content. No actual command execution, network requests, credential access, or cryptographic operations exist in the codebase.
valueStatement: Struggling to monetize your Skool community? This skill applies proven $100M Money Models from Alex Hormozi to diagnose your business stage, calculate cash gaps, and recommend specific monetization mechanisms tailored to your CAC and goals.
userTitle: Design Skool Money Models with Hormozi Frameworks
limitations: Requires your CAC and current revenue metrics for accurate analysis
Cannot write sales copy or predict specific conversion rates
Limited to Skool platform monetization, not general business strategy
Does not create courses, emails, or content products

useCases.title: Design initial money model
useCases.description: Build a monetization strategy from scratch using Hormozi's 15 mechanisms

useCases.title: Optimize current pricing
useCases.description: Diagnose stage, identify gaps, and improve revenue per customer

useCases.title: Scale with tiers
useCases.description: Design tier structures and upsell sequences that maximize LTV

promptTemplates.title: New strategy
promptTemplates.prompt: I want to design a money model for my Skool community. My CAC is [X] and I currently have [Y] revenue per customer.

promptTemplates.title: Validate pricing
promptTemplates.prompt: Review my tier pricing: [X], [Y], [Z]. Does this follow Hormozi principles? What changes would you recommend?

promptTemplates.title: Mechanism selection
promptTemplates.prompt: I'm at Stage [X] with goal [Y]. Which of Hormozi's 15 mechanisms should I implement first? Show me the Skool setup steps.

promptTemplates.title: Revenue projection
promptTemplates.prompt: Calculate my 30-day cash if I add a $497 one-time purchase course with a 3.5% take rate to my current [X] monthly subscribers at $[Y]/month.

bestPractices: Start with one mechanism, test until reliable, then add the next
Always validate tier pricing ratios using the 1.1x (decoy) or 3x (anchor) patterns
Calculate all financial projections using the math_helpers.py functions for accuracy
antiPatterns: Implementing multiple mechanisms at once creates confusion about what drives results
Tier pricing in the 1.5-2.5x range (2x Trap) kills upgrade conversions
Skipping stage diagnosis and jumping to tactics wastes time and money

faq.question: What data do I need to provide?
faq.answer: You need your CAC (Customer Acquisition Cost), current monthly revenue, number of paid members, and your primary business goal.

faq.question: How long does the analysis take?
faq.answer: The initial diagnosis takes a few minutes once you provide your metrics. You'll receive a complete roadmap immediately.

faq.question: Can this guarantee results?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides frameworks and calculations. Your results depend on execution quality and market factors.

faq.question: What makes this different from generic advice?
faq.answer: Every recommendation cites Hormozi's exact definitions with source line numbers and verifies prerequisites before applying mechanisms.

faq.question: Do I need Python installed?
faq.answer: No. The skill can describe calculations, but having Python 3.x enabled lets Claude run exact financial formulas.

faq.question: What Skool models does this support?
faq.answer: All five Skool models: Free, Subscription, Freemium, Tiers, and One-Time Payment. Plus classroom one-time purchases.
